Sleeve concentration warning: Drew Edwards has Optex + Oisix + Musashi 15-18% NAV at same PM — flag against further concentration. ENTRY ¥1,400-1,550 (ideal ≤¥1,450); NO-CHASE >¥1,813 (WAC +15%); HARD-STOP no-add >¥1,891 (WAC +20% AND GMO not adding 90d). UPGRADE TRIPWIRES (L2 5% → L1 7-8%): GMO crosses 11.5%; founder block transfer to GMO (Recruit-style); Drew Edwards public letter / capital allocation demand; buyback ≥¥5B; Q1 FY27 OP ≥¥2.4B. TRIM (5% → 3% outside CWP): px >¥1,815 no GMO accumulation 90d; Q1 FY27 OP miss >15% (<¥1.85B); GMO reduces 0.5pp. HARD EXITS: GMO <9.5% (1pp from peak); FY27 OP guidance cut; founder dumps 3pp+; fraud. PORTFOLIO: GMO-Usonian sub-sleeve ~10% NAV (Oisix + Optex); non-correlated to June AGM cluster (SQEX 3D, Yakult Dalton, DOE5%). Keep at 5% as ballast through June correlation spike.
